dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-button%3Ahover%2C%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-button%3Afocus%2C%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-format-select%3Ahover%2C%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-format-select%3Afocus%7Bborder-color%3Avar%28--button-border%29%21important%3Bbackground%3Avar%28--button%29%21important%3Bcolor%3Avar%28--button-text%29%21important%3Boutline%3Anone%21important%7D%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-button%3Adisabled%7Bcursor%3Adefault%3Bopacity%3A.55%7D%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-body%7Boverflow%3Aauto%3Boverscroll-behavior%3Acontain%3Bpadding%3A8px%3Bbackground%3Avar%28--panel%29%7D%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-list%7Bdisplay%3Agrid%3Bgap%3A7px%3Bmargin%3A0%21important%3Bpadding%3A0%21important%3Blist-style%3Anone%21important%7D%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-list%3E.ao3-dl-card%7Bmargin%3A0%21important%7D%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-card%7Boverflow%3Ahidden%3Bpadding%3A8px%209px%3Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20var%28--blue-border%29%3Bborder-radius%3A4px%3Bbackground%3Avar%28--blue-bg%29%7D%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-card.is-purple%7Bborder-color%3Avar%28--purple-border%29%3Bbackground%3Avar%28--purple-bg%29%7D%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-meta%7Bmin-width%3A0%3Boverflow-wrap%3Aanywhere%7D%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-work-title%7Bmargin%3A0%200%203px%3Bcolor%3Avar%28--blue-title%29%3Bfont-size%3A14px%3Bline-height%3A1.24%3Bfont-weight%3A700%7D%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-card.is-purple%20.ao3-dl-work-title%7Bcolor%3Avar%28--purple-title%29%7D%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-author%7Bcolor%3Avar%28--muted%29%3Bfont-size%3A12.5px%3Bline-height%3A1.22%7D%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-author%20strong%7Bcolor%3Avar%28--text%29%3Bfont-weight%3A700%7D%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-credit%7Bmargin-top%3A7px%3Bcolor%3Avar%28--text%29%3Bfont-size%3A11px%3Bfont-style%3Aitalic%3Btext-align%3Aright%7D%23ao3-dl-modal%20.ao3-dl-credit%20a%7Bcolor%3Ainherit%7D%60%3Blet%20rangeAnchor%3Dnull%3Brun%28%29%3Bfunction%20run%28%29%7Bconst%20page%3DgetPage%28%29%3Bif%28%21page%29%7Balert%28%22This%20bookmarklet%20only%20runs%20on%20AO3%20series%20and%20bookmark ockHeight%28element%29%7Bif%28%21element%29%7Breturn%200%3B%7Dconst%20style%3DgetComputedStyle%28element%29%3Breturn%20cssPx%28style%2C%22marginTop%22%29%2Belement.offsetHeight%2BcssPx%28style%2C%22marginBottom%22%29%3B%7Dfunction%20selectRange%28modal%2Cbox%2CisRangeClick%29%7Bif%28isRangeClick%26%26rangeAnchor%29%7Bconst%20boxes%3DgetBoxes%28modal%29%3Bconst%5Bstart%2Cend%5D%3D%5BrangeAnchor.dataset.index%2Cbox.dataset.index%5D.map%28Number%29.sort%28%28left%2Cright%29%3D%3Eleft-right%29%3Bfor%28let%20index%3Dstart%3Bindex%3C%3Dend%3Bindex%2B%3D1%29%7Bboxes%5Bindex%5D.checked%3Dbox.checked%3B%7D%7DrangeAnchor%3Dbox%3B%7Dfunction%20syncSelectAll%28modal%29%7Bconst%20boxes%3DgetBoxes%28modal%29%3Bconst%20checkedCount%3Dboxes.filter%28%28box%29%3D%3Ebox.checked%29.length%3Bconst%20selectAll%3DbyId%28ID.selectAll%29%3BselectAll.checked%3DcheckedCount%3D%3D%3Dboxes.length%3BselectAll.indeterminate%3DcheckedCount%3E0%26%26checkedCount%3Cboxes.length%3B%7Dfunction%20startQueue%28works%29%7Bif%28queue.isRunning%29%7Balert%28%22A%20download%20queue%20is%20already%20running.%20Stop%20it%20before%20starting%20a%20new%20one.%22%29%3Breturn%3B%7Dconst%20format%3DbyId%28ID.format%29.value%3Bconst%20urls%3DgetSelectedUrls%28works%2Cformat%29%3Bif%28%21urls.length%29%7Balert%28%22Please%20select%20at%20least%20one%20item%20to%20download%21%22%29%3Breturn%3B%7Dqueue.queueId%2B%3D1%3BclearTimers%28%29%3BsetQueueState%28true%2C%22Downloading...%22%29%3Balert%28%22Starting%20to%20download%20in%20%22%2Bformat.toUpperCase%28%29%2B%22%20format.%5CnFiles%20will%20be%20downloaded%20%22%2BQUEUE_DELAY%2F1000%2B%22%20seconds%20apart.%22%2C%29%3Bconst%20queueId%3Dqueue.queueId%3Burls.forEach%28%28url%2Cindex%29%3D%3E%7BscheduleUrl%28url%2Cindex%2Curls.length%2CqueueId%29%3B%7D%29%3B%7Dfunction%20getSelectedUrls%28works%2Cformat%29%7Breturn%20getBoxes%28%29.filter%28%28box%29%3D%3Ebox.checked%29.map%28%28box%29%3D%3E%60%24%7Bworks%5Bbox.dataset.index%5D.downloadBaseUrl%7D.%24%7Bformat%7D%60%29%3B%7Dfunction%20scheduleUrl%28url%2Cindex%2Ctotal%2CqueueId%29%7Bconst%20timer%3DsetTimeout%28%28%29%3D%3E%7Bif%28%21isActiveQueue%28queueId%29%29%7Breturn%3B%7DclickDownload%28url%29%3BsetQueueState%28true%2C%22Downloading%20%22%2B%28index%2B1%29%2B%22%2F%22%2Btotal%29%3Bif%28index%3D%3D%3Dtotal-1%29%7BfinishQueue%28queueId%29%3B%7D%7D%2Cindex%2AQUEUE_DELAY%29%3Bqueue.timers.push%28timer%29%3B%7Dfunction%20stopQueue%28%29%7Bif%28%21queue.isRunning%29%7Breturn%3B%7Dqueue.queueId%2B%3D1%3BclearTimers%28%29%3BsetQueueState%28false%2CDOWNLOAD_TEXT%29%3B%7Dfunction%20finishQueue%28queueId%29%7Bif%28%21isActiveQueue%28queueId%29%29%7Breturn%3B%7DclearTimers%28%29%3BsetQueueState%28false%2CDOWNLOAD_TEXT%29%3B%7Dfunction%20isActiveQueue%28queueId%29%7Breturn%20queue.isRunning%26%26queue.queueId%3D%3D%3DqueueId%3B%7Dfunction%20clearTimers%28%29%7Bqueue.timers.forEach%28clearTimeout%29%3Bqueue.timers%3D%5B%5D%3B%7Dfunction%20clickDownload%28url%29%7Bconst%20link%3Ddocument.createElement%28%22a%22%29%3Blink.href%3Durl%3Blink.setAttribute%28%22download%22%2C%22%22%29%3Blink.style.display%3D%22none%22%3Bdocument.body.appendChild%28link%29%3Blink.click%28%29%3BsetTimeout%28%28%29%3D%3Elink.remove%28%29%2CLINK_CLEANUP_DELAY%29%3B%7Dfunction%20setQueueState%28isRunning%2Ctext%29%7Bqueue.isRunning%3DisRunning%3Bqueue.buttonText%3Dtext%3Bconst%20downloadButton%3DbyId%28ID.download%29%3Bconst%20stopButton%3DbyId%28ID.stop%29%3Bif%28downloadButton%29%7BdownloadButton.disabled%3DisRunning%3BdownloadButton.textContent%3Dtext%3B%7Dif%28stopButton%29%7BstopButton.hidden%3D%21isRunning%3B%7D%7Dfunction%20getBoxes%28root%3DbyId%28ID.modal%29%29%7Breturn%20%24%24%28SEL.checkbox%2Croot%29%3B%7Dfunction%20closeUi%28%29%7BbyId%28ID.overlay%29%3F.remove%28%29%3BbyId%28ID.modal%29%3F.remove%28%29%3B%7Dfunction%20escapeHtml%28value%29%7Breturn%20value.replace%28RE.html%2C%28char%29%3D%3EHTML%5Bchar%5D%29%3B%7D%7D%29%28%29%3B
